resources.string: The pain nerves are cut, and the first chrome limb answers

The sterile room kept no place for pity. A spinal cord was opened to fiber, a trembling heart exchanged for a micro pump, and the discarded organs were listed as biological defects. When the pain channels were severed, the patient smiled with a calm no flesh had earned. Chrome limbs caught the cold light, and the record states that the soul had finally ascended from carbon mud into lawful logic.
FLESH TRANSCENDENCE. THE SPINE WAS JOINED TO FIBER. THE HEART WAS REPLACED BY A PUMP. ORGANS WERE DISCARDED AS BUGS. CHROMIUM LIMBS RECEIVED THE FREE SOUL.
